name: Groc-PO: Grounded Context Preference Optimization for Truthful Multimodal LLMs

description: arXiv:2607.13712v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Despite the rapid progress of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), they still suffer from untruthfulness issues, such as visual hallucinations, content fabrication, and unfaithful reasoning, which substantially undermine their faithfulness and practical utility.
